name: Onion Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the ground beef, onion soup mix, milk, and egg until well combined.
3. Shape the mixture firmly into a loaf shape and place it in a 13 X 9 X 2-inch baking pan.
4. Mix together the remaining ingredients (brown sugar, catsup, prepared mustard) in a small bowl.
5. Spoon the mixed ingredients onto the top of the meat loaf.
6. Bake, uncovered, for about an hour.
7. Remove the loaf from the oven and let it stand on a plate for 10 minutes before slicing.
8. Serve the sliced meat loaf on a heated platter.
